name: TuSimple Holdings Inc.
business: TuSimple is a global autonomous driving technology company headquartered in San Diego, California, with operations in the United States and Asia-Pacific region. The company develops full-stack L4 autonomous driving technology and is building an Autonomous Freight Network (AFN) to provide autonomous freight capacity as a service. It operates in two reportable geographic segments: U.S. and APAC.
sellsTo: Customers needing autonomous freight transportation without owning semi-truck assets
Customers who prefer to own their fleet and purchase purpose-built L4 autonomous semi-trucks

exposures.sentence: Our proprietary L4 autonomous driving solutions include our L4-capable ADS, such as 1,000 meter perception range, multi-modal perception, and offboard capabilities, such as high definition ( HD ) maps, machine-learning, autonomy visualization and simulation capabilities, and an integrated L4 autonomous semi-truck design consisting of a redundant sensor suite, on-board computing solutions, and other components.

Our sensor fusion technology actively integrates and fuses data from the various sensors (e.g, camera + LiDAR + radar) and HD maps to perceive, understand and create a detailed 3D representation of the surrounding environment.
Our perception system is powered by proprietary artificial intelligence technology and, when coupled with our proprietary camera module, enables the semi-truck s 1,000 meter perception range.
We have developed proprietary technologies and systems necessary for the development and deployment of our autonomous trucking operations within the AFN.
Our AFN will provide autonomous freight capacity as a service through two service models based on users needs: TuSimple Capacity and Carrier-Owned Capacity.

tamClaims.claim: The global truck freight market is estimated at $4 trillion.
tamClaims.sentence: We are working to revolutionize the estimated $4 trillion global truck freight market by developing proprietary technologies that enable the scaled development and deployment of autonomous freight transportation.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. addressable market is approximately $800 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: In the U.S. and APAC alone, the addressable markets are approximately $800 billion and $1.6 trillion, respectively.

tamClaims.claim: APAC addressable market is approximately $1.6 trillion.
tamClaims.sentence: In the U.S. and APAC alone, the addressable markets are approximately $800 billion and $1.6 trillion, respectively.

tamClaims.claim: China addressable market is approximately $900 billion.
Japan addressable market is approximately $150 billion.
